title: 『オペレーション：外出時トラブル』

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, Bourbon! I'd like to know more about you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I fail to understand your intentions. Why?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... well, I just thought that even though we
share a dorm room, there's so much I don't know
about you. It just feels a little weird...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So... If possible, I want you to take me to one of
your favorite places!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Reasoning understood. Request
approved.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, traveling to a place I like will be
somewhat arduous. Is that acceptable?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! I'll do my best to go anywhere you want!

I tag along with the two of them as their
chaperone until we reach the mountain that
Mihono Bourbon suggested.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can hear so many birds chirping... This
place is wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Although it's rich in flora and fauna, it's
incredibly well-maintained for hikers.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There is also a cafe at the summit that sells
traditional desserts, which are well-suited for
replenishing energy reserves after climbing.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Wow, I can't wait!

After several hours of climbing, we reach a sign
stating that the summit is only a hundred meters
ahead. However...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I detect labored breathing from you, Flower.
Are you feeling unwell?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm f-fine! Sorry, ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Eeep!
Nishino Flower loses her balance and falls over!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Her anterior talofibular ligament seems to be
twisted. Recovery will take several hours, during
which she will be unable to continue climbing.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I'll just wait here, then! Please, go on
ahead to the summit, you two!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Request rejected on account of associated risk.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, there is a chairlift nearby that can take us
down the mountain. We should head there.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But... we've come so far!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It would also be possible for me to carry you to
the summit on my back.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Er, well, that's—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. We will search for the
chairlift. Let's go, Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... Not only did I ruin the climb, but now
we're going to miss out on that dessert too...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Accessing data log.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There is a popular Japanese-style dessert shop
that opened one month ago at the foot of this
mountain.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Their most popular item is the exquisite shiratama
cream zenzai—a sweet red-bean soup with mochi,
cream, and fruit.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Shall we stop by, Trainer?

We soon find the newly opened shop at the foot
of the mountain, just like Mihono Bourbon said.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mmm, so gooood... So fluffy, so chewy!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Relaxing effects of high-quality sugar intake
confirmed. A second visit will be taken into
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: With you, of course, Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. We will head to the summit.
Get on my back, Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you... but I don't want to be any more of
a burden!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No. The primary factor that lead to this
predicament was my failure to notice your fatigue
despite my extensive climbing experience.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition, your weight is within my load-bearing
capacity. You will not be a "burden."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: B-but...

With Bourbon's gentle reassurance, the
ever-hesitant Nishino Flower falls silent for a
moment before nodding.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant.

We head for the summit and manage to arrive
without any issues after thirty more minutes of
hiking.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Amazing... What a beautiful blue sky!

Nishino Flower is entranced by the stunning view
from the summit.
Then, on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Even though I said I'd wait for you both, the truth
is that I really wanted to go to the summit.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Thank you, Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No thanks are necessary. The view really was
spectacular today.
